samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 bytecode generation correctly.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace explicit source and target configuration with the unified release flag for Java 21.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern Java versions to ensure API compatibility.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Define the java.version property as 21 to drive the compiler release flag.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler configuration references ${java.version} which must be defined for the build to succeed.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/src/main/java/co.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for string interpolation.
Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for string interpolation.
